[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [StopHydration](../fast-element.stophydration/index.html)

## StopHydration variable

Describes when FAST should stop hydrating newly connected prerendered elements.

**Signature:**

```typescript
StopHydration: Readonly<{
    readonly hydrationComplete: "hydration-complete";
    readonly never: "never";
}>
```
